generated_oml:
// C2: Acting Components
instance LightingActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Smart lighting actuator integrated into Building Control System (BCS) with occupancy-based dimming capabilities, configured via BIM metadata and controlled through Eclipse Ditto middleware."
]

instance HVACActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "HVAC actuator system including thermostats, dampers, and fans with semantic enrichment in BIM models for automated deployment into the Digital Twin runtime environment."
]

instance ReinforcementLearningController : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Adaptive lighting controller using reinforcement learning policies from BOREALIS framework, integrated with BIM device metadata for dynamic control optimization."
]

// C3: Physical Sensing Components
instance OccupancySensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Post-occupancy sensor deployed across building infrastructure to detect presence and movement patterns, with metadata extraction from BIM models for Ditto endpoint configuration."
    DTDFVocab:producedData OccupancyDataStream
]

instance EnvironmentalSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Multi-parameter environmental sensor measuring temperature, humidity, and CO2 levels with semantic alignment to BIM components for real-time data synchronization."
    DTDFVocab:producedData EnvironmentalDataStream
]

instance LightingSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Lighting sensor monitoring illuminance levels and occupancy states, with automated metadata extraction from BIM to configure Eclipse Hono/Ditto endpoints."
    DTDFVocab:producedData LightingDataStream
]

// C4: Physical-to-Virtual Interaction
instance OccupancyDataStream : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom OccupancySensor
]

instance EnvironmentalDataStream : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom EnvironmentalSensor
]

instance LightingDataStream : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom LightingSensor
]

instance ControlSignalStream : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom ReinforcementLearningController
]

// C10: Models/Data
instance BIMModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Building Information Model enriched with device metadata (tenant IDs, endpoint addresses) and control logic (reinforcement learning policies in BOREALIS), serving as the semantic foundation for the Digital Twin."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo BIMToolingEnabler
]

instance RuntimeDataModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Model-driven transformation output from BIM to Eclipse Ditto/Unreal Engine 5 runtime environment, enabling real-time visualization and analytics of building operations."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DittoRuntimeEnabler
]

instance SensorDataRepository : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Centralized repository of real-time sensor streams (occupancy, environmental, control signals) ingested via Eclipse Hono and processed by the Digital Twin runtime."
    DTDFVocab:fromData OccupancyDataStream, EnvironmentalDataStream, LightingDataStream
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DittoRuntimeEnabler
]

instance ControlPolicyDatabase : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Database of reinforcement learning-based control policies (e.g., BOREALIS adaptive lighting) dynamically integrated with the Digital Twin for operational optimization."
    DTDFVocab:fromData ControlSignalStream
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ReinforcementLearningEnabler
]

// C11: Enablers
instance BIMToolingEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Model-driven engineering tools (Revit/ArchiCAD) for semantic enrichment of BIM models with device metadata and control logic extraction."
    DTDFVocab:enables BIMToRuntimeTransformationService
]

instance EclipseHonoEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Eclipse Hono device management platform providing bidirectional communication between physical sensors/actuators and the Digital Twin via MQTT/HTTP protocols."
    DTDFVocab:enables DeviceManagementService
]

instance DittoRuntimeEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Eclipse Ditto runtime platform enabling service-oriented architecture for modular Digital Twin services with standardized extension points."
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringService, PredictiveAnalyticsService
]

instance UnrealEngineEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Unreal Engine 5 platform delivering interactive 3D visualization for immersive monitoring of building operations and real-time sensor data."
    DTDFVocab:enables VisualizationService
]

instance ReinforcementLearningEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "BOREALIS reinforcement learning framework enabling adaptive control policies for dynamic optimization of building operations."
    DTDFVocab:enables AdaptiveControlService
]

// C6: Services
instance RealTimeMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Interactive 3D visualization service via Unreal Engine 5 for real-time monitoring of building operations, sensor data, and control states."
    DTDFVocab:provides BuildingPerformanceInsight, ControlStateVisualization
]

instance PredictiveAnalyticsService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Simulation-based optimization service for energy consumption, visual comfort, and non-visual health effects using predictive analytics."
    DTDFVocab:provides EnergyOptimizationInsight, ComfortAssessmentInsight
]

instance AdaptiveControlService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Reinforcement learning-based control service dynamically adjusting lighting and HVAC systems based on real-time sensor data."
    DTDFVocab:provides OccupancyBasedLightingAction, EnergyEfficientHVACAction
]

instance VisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "3D visualization service providing immersive monitoring of building performance metrics for facility managers and engineers."
    DTDFVocab:provides StakeholderCollaborationInsight
]

instance DeviceManagementService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Automated commissioning service ensuring bidirectional synchronization between BIM and physical devices for seamless integration."
    DTDFVocab:provides DeviceIntegrationAction
]

// C17: Insights/Actions
instance BuildingPerformanceInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time performance metrics of building systems including energy consumption, occupancy patterns, and environmental conditions."
]

instance EnergyOptimizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Predictive analytics on lighting, HVAC, and occupancy patterns to reduce operational costs through optimized control policies."
]

instance ComfortAssessmentInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Non-visual health metrics including circadian rhythm optimization derived from post-occupancy sensor data."
]

instance OccupancyBasedLightingAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automated adjustment of lighting systems based on real-time occupancy detection using reinforcement learning policies."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance EnergyEfficientHVACAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Dynamic HVAC control adjustments to maintain optimal environmental conditions while minimizing energy consumption."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance ControlStateVisualization : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Visual representation of current control states and sensor readings in the 3D Digital Twin environment."
]

instance StakeholderCollaborationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Visualization tools enabling facility managers and engineers to collaborate on data-driven decision making regarding building operations."
]

instance DeviceIntegrationAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automated deployment and configuration of new sensors/actuators through bidirectional BIM-physical system synchronization."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

// C1: Environment
instance BuildingInfrastructureEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Physical built environment containing academic buildings and Living Labs with embedded Building Control Systems."
    base:contains OccupancySensor, EnvironmentalSensor, LightingSensor, LightingActuator, HVACActuator, ReinforcementLearningController
]

// C5: Components
instance BIMToRuntimeTransformationService : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Model-driven transformation pipeline converting BIM semantics to Eclipse Ditto/Unreal Engine 5 runtime interfaces for real-time synchronization."
]

instance ReinforcementLearningPolicyDatabase : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Central repository of reinforcement learning policies (BOREALIS) dynamically integrated with the Digital Twin for adaptive control optimization."
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "The virtual-to-physical interaction involves **control signal generation** and execution by the DT to influence the physical system, achieved through:
  - **Automated generation of runtime interfaces** from BIM models, enabling the DT to send commands (e.g., lighting adjustments, HVAC setpoints) to physical actuators.
  - **Bidirectional communication** via **Eclipse Ditto** and **Eclipse Hono**, which act as middleware to translate DT control signals into executable commands for the BCS.
  - **Reinforcement learning-based control policies** (e.g., adaptive lighting optimization in **BOREALIS**) dynamically adjusting physical system parameters based on virtual simulations.
  The framework supports **real-time feedback loops** where virtual decisions (e.g., energy optimization) are translated into physical actions with minimal latency."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "The twinning time scale operates on **real-time and iterative learning cycles**. The DT synchronizes with physical systems at **millisecond-to-second intervals** for real-time monitoring and control (e.g., adaptive lighting adjustments). Additionally, the BOREALIS project employs **post-occupancy sensor data** for **iterative reinforcement learning**, refining control policies over longer timeframes (e.g., weeks or months) to optimize energy consumption and occupant comfort. The framework does not specify sub-second latency but emphasizes **real-time synchronization** for critical operational feedback."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The DT constellation is orchestrated as a **service-oriented, modular system** with the following components:
  - **BIM Core**: The semantic foundation for device modeling and DT deployment.
  - **Middleware Layer**: **Eclipse Hono** (device management) and **Ditto** (runtime services) enable bidirectional communication.
  - **Visualization Layer**: **Unreal Engine 5** provides immersive 3D monitoring and interaction.
  - **Service Layer**: Custom services (e.g., energy optimization, predictive maintenance) integrate via **standardized extension points**.
  - **Control Layer**: Reinforcement learning and adaptive policies (e.g., **BOREALIS**) dynamically adjust physical system behavior.
  The constellation supports **scalable, interoperable DT deployment** by decoupling components via **modular interfaces** and **real-time data exchange**."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "The DT operates across **all life cycle stages** of the building, from **design to operation and refurbishment**:
  - **Design phase**: BIM models are enriched with **device semantics** (e.g., sensor/actuator configurations) for DT deployment.
  - **Construction phase**: Physical devices are commissioned and integrated into the DT via **automated middleware configuration** (Eclipse Hono/Ditto).
  - **Operation phase**: The DT provides **real-time monitoring, optimization, and control** (e.g., adaptive lighting, energy management).
  - **Refurbishment phase**: The DT supports **dynamic reconfiguration** of services and sensors without full redeployment, ensuring continuity of virtual representation.
  The DT covers **as-designed (ideal), as-manufactured, and as-operated** representations, with **semantic drift mitigation** via continuous synchronization."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Fidelity and validity are ensured through:
  - **Semantic alignment**: BIM models are **formally enriched** with device metadata to prevent **semantic drift** during deployment.
  - **Real-time synchronization**: **Eclipse Hono/Ditto** ensure low-latency data exchange, minimizing discrepancies between PT and DT.
  - **Validation metrics**: The **Overall Digital Twin Entanglement (ODTE)** metric quantifies synchronization accuracy, assessing how closely the DT reflects the physical system.
  - **Uncertainty modeling**: Post-occupancy data (e.g., sensor noise, environmental variability) is incorporated into **reinforcement learning policies** to refine DT fidelity over time.
  - **Verification**: Automated checks validate **device configurations** and **control logic** before DT deployment."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "The DT employs **Eclipse Hono and Ditto middleware** for technical connectivity, leveraging **bidirectional communication protocols** (e.g., RESTful APIs, message brokers) to synchronize data between physical sensors/actuators and the virtual twin. While specific protocols like **MQTT or OPC UA** are not explicitly mentioned, the text confirms reliance on **standardized middleware frameworks** for interoperability. Endpoints are configured via **tenant and device IDs** extracted from BIM models."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "The DT is deployed as **scalable, deployable artifacts** using **containerized environments** (e.g., Docker) for middleware components (Hono/Ditto). The visualization layer (Unreal Engine) may require **dedicated servers** for high-performance rendering, though the text does not specify cloud or on-premises hosting. The framework prioritizes **scalability** and **modular deployment** to accommodate growing infrastructure systems."
]

instance horizontal_integration : DTDFVocab:HoriIntegration [
    base:desc "The DT framework supports **horizontal integration** through:
   - **Standardized extension points** for third-party services (e.g., IoT platforms, analytics tools).
   - **Interoperability with AECO-specific standards** (e.g., BIM, middleware APIs).
   - **Modular service architecture** enabling seamless communication with external systems (e.g., building management software).
   The text does not exclude specific protocols (e.g., OPC UA) but focuses on **open-source middleware** (Hono/Ditto) for broad compatibility."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "The framework adheres to **AECO-specific standards** (e.g., BIM) and **middleware compliance** (e.g., Eclipse Ditto’s OMA LWM2M standards). While **IFC (Industry Foundation Classes)** or **BCF (BIM Collaboration Format)** are not explicitly mentioned, the **BIM backbone** ensures alignment with **industry best practices**. Standardization is primarily achieved through **modular, service-oriented design** and **semantic integration** with existing AECO workflows."
]
